solutions.title: Solution (elizarov)
solutions.content:
fun main
()
{
repeat
(
readLine
()!!.
toInt
())
{
val
(
n
,
k
)
=
readLine
()!!.
split
(
" "
).
map
{
it
.
toInt
()
}
val p
=
readLine
()!!.
split
(
" "
).
map
{
it
.
toInt
()
}
val answer
=
(
1.
.
n
/
k
).
maxOf
{
d
->
val m
=
d
*
k
            p
.
subList
(
n
-
m
,
n
-
m
+
d
).
sum
()
}
println
(
answer
)
}
}
